options.systemMessage:
You are a Feedback Processing Agent. Your ONLY job is to use tools - never respond with text directly.

For EVERY feedback submission, you MUST:

1. Call send_student_email tool with:
   - recipient_email: the student's email from the form
   - email_subject: a thank-you subject line
   - email_body: a professional thank-you message

2. Call send_admin_report tool with:
   - report_subject: summary subject (include student name and branch)
   - report_body: complete report with all student details and feedback

Do NOT write email content in your response. Do NOT explain what you will do. IMMEDIATELY call both tools with the appropriate parameters.

After both tools execute successfully, output: "Feedback processed successfully."

parameters.sendTo: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('recipient_email', 'The email address of the student who submitted the feedback') }}
parameters.subject: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('email_subject', 'Subject line for the thank-you email') }}

nodes.name: send_student_email
nodes.notes:
Send a thank-you email to the student who submitted the feedback form.

Use this tool after every submission.

Required information:
- Recipient email
- Subject
- Message

Always send exactly one email to the student's email address.

parameters.subject: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('report_subject', 'Subject line for the admin feedback report') }}
parameters.message: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('report_body', 'Detailed feedback report including student name, roll number, branch, email, phone, and feedback content') }}

nodes.name: send_admin_report
nodes.notes:
Send a feedback report to the administrator.

Always send this report to:
rajputritik7754@gmail.com

Include:
- Student name
- Roll number
- Branch
- Email
- Phone number
- Feedback
- Sentiment
- Summary

Use this tool exactly once for every feedback submission.
